dlco.t: [医]Diffusion Capacity for Carbon Monoxide of the Lung

dle.t: [计] 数据通信交换码字符
dle.d: n a chronic skin disease occurring primarily in women between the ages of 20 and 40; characterized by an eruption of red lesions over the cheeks and bridge of the nose

dles.t: abbr. DTM LAN emulation server 动态同步传送模式局域网仿真服务器

dlma.t: abbr. Decorative Lighting Manufacturers Association 装饰灯具制造业协会; Downtown Lower Manhattan Association 市中心曼哈顿协会

dlo.t: abbr. （美）邮局死信部（Dead Letter Office）；数据线路被占用（Data Line Occupied）

dlp.t: abbr. 民主工党（Democratic Labour Party）；数字光处理器（Digital Light Processing）

dls.d: n a metric unit of volume equal to one tenth of a liter

dlt.t: abbr. dans le texte (Fench=in the text) （法语）在文中; dry long tons 干长（英）吨

dltetrahydropalmatine.t: 消旋四氢巴马丁; 消旋延胡索乙素
